/usr/bin/c++  -I/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.4.sdk/usr/include/c++/v1 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/point_analyzer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/point_analyzer.dir/src/point_analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/point_analyzer.dir/src/report_generator.cpp.o -o bin/point_analyzer
